title: Tier L Manifest
description: JSON Schema for Tier L block manifests. Tier L = 9+ files modified/created, OR cross-repo impact. Requires an ADR.

id.description: Block identifier. Format: block-NNN (zero-padded to 3 digits).

tier.description: Must be L for this schema.

kind.description: Nature of the work this block performs.

phase.description: Phase this block belongs to. Format: phase-N.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the block.

adr_required.description: Must be true for all Tier L blocks. An ADR is mandatory for large-scope changes.

adr_ref.description: Path to the ADR documenting this block's architectural decision. Required when adr_required is true.

owner.description: Named owner who executes this block. Required for Tier L.

dependencies.description: Block IDs that must be status:done before this block starts.

read.description: Files read during block execution (not modified).

modify.description: Existing files modified by this block.

create.description: New files created by this block.

files.$comment: Tier L constraint: len(modify) + len(create) >= 9, OR cross_repo: true. Checked by /validate-manifest.

name.description: Unique gate identifier within this manifest.

paths.description: File paths checked by file-changed or file-exists gates.

description.description: Human-readable description of what passes this gate.

gates.description: Pass conditions. Tier L requires at least 2 gates.

created_at.description: Date manifest was created. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

cross_repo.description: True if this block touches files outside the primary repository. Triggers Tier L even with fewer than 9 file changes.

rollback_plan.description: How to revert this block's changes if it fails after partial completion.

review_required.description: True if a second reviewer must approve before block close. Recommended for Tier L.

estimated_hours.description: Estimated hours to complete. Recommended for Tier L.

axiom_override.description: If an axiom is overridden, state which and why. See PROTOCOLS.md axiom override protocol.

tierLConstraint.$comment: Tier L: len(files.modify) + len(files.create) >= 9 OR cross_repo: true. adr_required must be true and adr_ref must be present. Checked by /validate-manifest.
